data.body: CHECKPOINT: Bug-Fix Mode session 4 — COMPLEX classification confirmed (546 occurrences, 117 files). Fix approach: replace echo|grep -q with [[ =~ ]] or grep -c. Cannot invoke /dso:brainstorm during active debug-everything session without derailing it. Deferring to standalone /dso:brainstorm invocation after this session completes. This is the 4th COMPLEX escalation; fix approach is fully documented. Reverting to open status pending dedicated brainstorm session.
